transcript: Welcome to the John Wick [music] Experience Las Vegas. An action-packed immersive adventure into the world of John Wick. Loyalties will be tested. Alliances will be forged. In danger, it's always one step behind you. Navigate carefully. One misstep could trigger a contract. Will you beat the odds? The manager is expecting you. The high table is watching. And once the word is out, there's no [music] turning back. Whatever brings you to the John Wick Las Vegas Continental, one thing is certain. You won't forget your stay. [music] Visit johnwickexperience.com to make your reservation.
